nasb.text: As the king of Israel was passing by on the wall a woman cried out to him, saying, “Help, my lord, O king!”

esv.text: Now as the king of Israel was passing by on the wall, a woman cried out to him, saying, “Help, my lord, O king!”

cnv.text: 以色列王在城牆上經過時，有一個婦人向他呼求說：“我主我王啊，救救我！”

ccb.text: 一天，以色列王从城墙上走过，一个妇人向他哭喊道：“我主我王啊，求你帮帮我！”
